body:
GIAIC Batch 1 Graduation Requirements to be Completed Before Eid
All GIAIC students will complete the following requirements for graduating the program. 
They will receive the following certification grades: 
Grade A: 90% and above
Grade B: 80% - 89%
Grade C: 70% - 79%
Fail: Less than 69%

The final certification grades will will consist of two parts:

Part 1: Hackathon 1 & 2: = 40% of your grade, 20% each.
Part 2: Hackathon 0 & 5, and Final Exam = 60% of your grade, 20% each.

Final Part 1 (40% of your grade):

Part 1 - Requirement 1 (20% of your grade):
Hackathon 1:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1nw6D37JmTfhPLHo0IfTeCcKajX3Lw9PidDmBjMG1G5o/edit?usp=sharing 

Part 1 - Requirement 2  (20% of your grade): 
Hackathon 2:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1KHxeDNnqG9uew-rEabQc5H8u3VmEN3OaJ_A1ZVVr9vY/edit?usp=sharing 

Final Part 2 (60% of your grade):

Part 2 - Requirement 1  (20% of your grade):
Complete Hackathon 0:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ofTMR1IE7jEMvXM-rdsGXy6unI4DLS_gc6dmZo8WPkI/edit?usp=sharing

Part 2 - Requirement 2  (20% of your grade):
Complete Hackathon 5:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Mm9FzdSETIksr_86FZPjg2KYHxSPk2evqcLVtZeG_g4/edit?usp=sharing 

Part 2 - Requirement 3  (20% of your grade):
Must Pass the following Final Exam with 70%+ score:
General Agents: Foundations Final Exam
Total Questions: 120
Time: 2 hours 30 Minutes

The final exam will cover the first six chapters of Part 1 of our text book:

Chapter 1: The AI Agent Factory Paradigm
https://agentfactory.panaversity.org/docs/General-Agents-Foundations/agent-factory-paradigm

Chapter 2: Markdown - Writing Instructions
https://agentfactory.panaversity.org/docs/General-Agents-Foundations/markdown-writing-instructions

Chapter 3: Working with General Agents: Claude Code and Cowork
https://agentfactory.panaversity.org/docs/General-Agents-Foundations/general-agents

Chapter 4: Effective Context Engineering with General Agents
https://agentfactory.panaversity.org/docs/General-Agents-Foundations/context-engineering

Chapter 5: Spec-Driven Development with Claude Code
https://agentfactory.panaversity.org/docs/General-Agents-Foundations/spec-driven-development

Chapter 6: The Seven Principles of General Agent Problem Solving
https://agentfactory.panaversity.org/docs/General-Agents-Foundations/seven-principles
